name: Everhour Time Tracking API
what_it_does: Project time tracking platform with REST API — deeply integrated with project management tools (Asana, Jira, Basecamp, Trello, GitHub) for logging time against tasks, tracking project budgets, and generating billing reports for agencies and service teams.
use_cases: Querying time entries logged against Asana/Jira tasks for billing calculations
Syncing project budget consumption data to financial reporting systems
Creating time entries programmatically from external time sources
Generating client billing reports from tracked project time via API
Monitoring team utilization and project profitability via reporting API
not_for: Shift scheduling for hourly workers (use When I Work or Deputy)
Standalone time tracking without project management tool context
Enterprise ERP time tracking with complex approval workflows
best_when: An agency or service team already using Asana, Jira, or Basecamp needs project-level time tracking with budget alerts and client billing report automation.
avoid_when: You don't use the supported project management tools, need shift scheduling, or require complex approval workflows.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. X-Api-Key header for authentication. No OAuth2 or scopes — account-level access. Team member API keys inherit their permission level within the account.

pricing.notes: No free tier. Minimum 5-user team plan. Czech company. API available on all paid plans. Strong integration with Asana, Jira, Trello, Basecamp, GitHub. Budget tracking and client invoicing. Focused on agencies and professional services.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; contact support for specifics

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for time entries, projects, users, clients, and reports. API key auth is simple. No webhooks — must poll for data. Good documentation for core time entry CRUD. Integration with PM tools is the key value prop; entities reference external task IDs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Time entry creation creates new records — not idempotent. Project and user management idempotent by ID. Read/report operations always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — polling required for new time entry detection
Time entries reference external PM tool task IDs — must maintain ID mapping
Project IDs are internal to Everhour, not synced from PM tools
Minimum 5-user plan — not suitable for individual or tiny team use

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency (Czech company). API key auth — no OAuth2. Standard SaaS security. No formal certifications. Czech company with GDPR compliance focus.
